label: 게임 산업
description: 게임사 실적, 투자, 퍼블리싱, 규제 같은 산업 중심 뉴스를 다루는 탭

articles.title: Peak co-developer Landfall might finance your next indie game
articles.summary: The studio's new publishing label, Evil Landfall, is looking to sink cash into silly titles with short development cycles.

articles.title: Supercell CEO Ilkka Paananen to receive BAFTA Fellowship
articles.summary: Paananen co-founded the Clash of Clans and Brawl Stars studio in 2010.

articles.title: Sony to acquire machine learning company Cinemersive Labs
articles.summary: Cinemersive will join SIE's Visual Computing Group and apply machine learning to enhance gameplay visuals and improve rendering techniques.

articles.title: Obituary: Double Dragon creator Yoshihisa Kishimoto has passed away at age 64
articles.summary: The designer is hailed for his influence on the beat-em-up genre.

articles.title: Former Halo Studios art director, other employees, accuse studio of harassment and retaliation
articles.summary: Longtime Halo artist Glenn Israel and other former Halo Studios workers say the company covered up harassment and bullying in the workplace.

articles.title: MechWarrior dev Piranha Games lays off 30% of staff, says CEO
articles.summary: "Was a horrible day no doubt but we do still continue to work on DLC," wrote CEO Russ Bullock.

articles.title: Laptop mishaps and a GDC chat with Owlchemy Labs CEO Andrew Eiche
articles.summary: Who among us hasn't forgotten the recording device they need for the first-ever podcast in a brand new podcast booth at a huge major event?

articles.title: Report: Take-Two lays off the head of AI and multiple team members
articles.summary: The head of AI at Take-Two says his time with the company has reportedly 'come to an end.'
